title: Startup lock → no duplicate containers on concurrent messages
evidence: All 5 TC-013 tests passed in 23ms: - ✓ TC-013: step 1 — acquireStartupLock(requestId1) returns {acquired: true} - ✓ TC-013: step 2 — concurrent acquireStartupLock(requestId2) returns {acquired: false} - ✓ TC-013: step 3 — after releaseStartupLock(requestId1), acquireStartupLock(requestId3) returns {acquired: true} - ✓ TC-013: step 4 — stale lock (expires_at 1ms ago) is overridden, {acquired: true} - ✓ TC-013: full sequence — mutual exclusion and stale takeover 316 tests passed, 14 skipped across 49 test files. The 2 suite failures (lifecycle.test.ts, tc-002.test.ts) are unrelated EADDRINUSE port conflicts in e2e tests.
